CurrentIssues.ID: LargeClass:GoToTest.kt:GoToTest : StructuredCooperationTest
LargeClass:LoopTest.kt:LoopTest : StructuredCooperationTest
LargeClass:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest : StructuredCooperationTest
LongMethod:CancellationTest.kt:CancellationTest$@Test fun `cancellation after everything has finished running has no effect`
LongMethod:CancellationTest.kt:CancellationTest$@Test fun `cancellation works`
LongMethod:ContextPropagationTest.kt:ContextPropagationTest$@Test fun `context is propagated correctly`
LongMethod:DeadlineTest.kt:DeadlineTest$@Test fun `happy path deadlines work`
LongMethod:HappyPathTest.kt:HappyPathTest$@Test fun `handler should not complete until handlers listening to emitted messages complete - depth 1`
LongMethod:HappyPathTest.kt:HappyPathTest$@Test fun `handler should not complete until handlers listening to emitted messages complete - depth 2`
LongMethod:HappyPathTest.kt:HappyPathTest$@Test fun `multiple handlers at same level should all complete before parent handler completes`
LongMethod:HappyPathTest.kt:HappyPathTest$@Test fun `parent should wait for multiple handlers listening to the same topic`
LongMethod:MessageEventsTest.kt:MessageEventsTest$@Test fun `multiple handler instances should coordinate using message events for multiple messages`
LongMethod:MessageEventsTest.kt:MessageEventsTest$@Test fun `should follow complete message event writing sequence on failed processing`
LongMethod:PendingCoroutineRunSqlTest.kt:PendingCoroutineRunSqlTest.ChildRollingBacks$@Test fun `picks up child rolling backs and their terminations`
LongMethod:ReturnValueTest.kt:ReturnValueTest$@Test fun `multiple child handlers can each store return values`
LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `a handler failing in its second step should emit ROLLBACK_EMITTEDs for messages emitted in the first step, and then roll it back`
LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `failed rollbacks are well behaved n-deep`
LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `rollbacks are well behaved n-deep`
LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `when a child fails, rollbacks happen in reverse order`
LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `when a later step fails, previous emissions are rolled back`

LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest.HandleChildFailures$@Test fun `when stuff is emitted in handleChildFailures and then a rollback happens, all things that haven't already been rolled back are rolled back`

LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest.RollbackRequests$@Test fun `rolling back sub-hierarchy works (but should be done carefully, as you run the risk of bringing the state of the system into an inconsistent state from a business perspective)`
LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest.RollbackRequests$@Test fun `rolling back the entire hierarchy works`
LongMethod:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest.RollbackRequests$@Test fun `rolling back while things are still running has no effect`
LongMethod:TryFinallyTest.kt:TryFinallyTest$@Test fun `finally is executed on child failure`
LongMethod:TryFinallyTest.kt:TryFinallyTest$@Test fun `finally is executed, once, on subsequent step failure`

MaxLineLength:DeadlineTest.kt:DeadlineTest$"[root handler] MissedHappyPathDeadline: Missed happy path deadline of root handler at ${deadline.get().deadline.format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_OFFSET_DATE_TIME)}. Deadline trace: [{\"HappyPathDeadlineKey\": {\"trace\": [], \"source\": \"root system\", \"deadline\": \"9999-12-31T23:59:59.999999Z\"}}]"

MaxLineLength:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$"[${rootHandlerCoroutine.identifier.asSource()}] io.github.gabrielshanahan.scoop.coroutine.eventloop.ChildRolledBackException: Child failure occurred while suspended in step [1]"

MaxLineLength:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$"[${rootHandlerCoroutine.identifier.asSource()}] io.github.gabrielshanahan.scoop.coroutine.structuredcooperation.ParentSaidSoException: <no message>"
MaxLineLength:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest.RollbackRequests$fun
ThrowsCount:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `a handler failing in its second step should emit ROLLBACK_EMITTEDs for messages emitted in the first step, and then roll it back`
ThrowsCount:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `failed rollbacks are well behaved n-deep`
ThrowsCount:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `when a child fails, rollbacks happen in reverse order`
ThrowsCount:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest$@Test fun `when a later step fails, previous emissions are rolled back`

ThrowsCount:RollbackPathTest.kt:RollbackPathTest.HandleChildFailures$@Test fun `when stuff is emitted in handleChildFailures and then a rollback happens, all things that haven't already been rolled back are rolled back`
TooGenericExceptionThrown:ContextPropagationTest.kt:ContextPropagationTest$throw RuntimeException("Failure")
TooGenericExceptionThrown:MessageEventsTest.kt:MessageEventsTest$throw RuntimeException("Simulated failure for event sequence test")
TooGenericExceptionThrown:MessageEventsTest.kt:MessageEventsTest$throw RuntimeException("Simulated failure to test rollback")
